title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入东帝汶：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入東帝汶：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage documentation against Timor-Leste ANE and EDTL conformity expectations, developing market interconnection practice under the energy ministry, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards, fire-safety installation planning, UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 transport obligations, and 220/380 V 50 Hz nominal grid alignment with China versus China GB/T 36276, GB 38031, GB/T 34131, and GB/T 36558 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与东帝汶ANE与EDTL合格评定预期、能源主管机构项目导向审批实践、IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、消防安全安装规划、UN 38.3与IEC 62281运输义务及220/380 V 50 Hz与中国名义电压一致性——对比中国GB/T 36276、GB 38031、GB/T 34131及GB/T 36558基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與東帝汶ANE與EDTL合格評定預期、能源主管機構項目導向審批實務、IEC 62619與IEC 62933國際標準、消防安全安裝規劃、UN 38.3與IEC 62281運輸義務及220/380 V 50 Hz與中國名義電壓一致性——對比中國GB/T 36276、GB 38031、GB/T 34131及GB/T 36558基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ANE conformity scope determination, EDTL grid-connection acceptance, fire-safety installation acceptance, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, EPC contractors, and installers should verify current Timor-Leste ANE/EDTL requirements, energy-ministry project interconnection guidance, IEC evidence expectations, dangerous-goods logistics rules, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ANE合格评定范围裁定、EDTL并网验收、消防安全安装验收、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方、EPC承包商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行东帝汶ANE和EDTL要求、能源主管机构项目并网指引、IEC证据预期、危险品物流规则和项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ANE合格評定範圍裁定、EDTL併網驗收、消防安全安裝驗收、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方、EPC承包商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行東帝汶ANE與EDTL要求、能源主管機構項目並網指引、IEC證據預期、危險品物流規則及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: Timor-Leste does not yet have a publicly confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to a full market-wide certification regime. The market is developing, with ANE serving as the likely national standard route, EDTL handling electricity-sector interconnection interfaces, and the energy ministry referenced in project approvals. A practical export matrix for China-to-Timor-Leste BESS is therefore: (1) IEC 62619 evidence for cell and module safety where procurement documents require it; (2) IEC 62933 project-level evidence for system safety and planning where specified; (3) EN/IEC-aligned fire-safety installation controls as required by project package; (4) UN 38.3 transport documentation for lithium-cell logistics; (5) confirmation of Timor-Leste project connection settings on a 220/380 V 50 Hz grid. Timor-Leste and China nominally share 220/380 V 50 Hz, which simplifies electrical parameter transfer relative to non-matching countries. EV and charging ecosystems are nascent, and market access for charging remains project-specific with IEC connector expectations only where those specifications apply.
answer_first.zh: 东帝汶目前尚未确认完全成熟且公开的全国性BESS产品强制性安全法规。该市场处于发展阶段，ANE承担国家标准路径角色，EDTL处理电力部门并网接口，能源主管机构在项目批准中被引用。中国到东帝汶BESS的实际差距通常包括：（1）项目文件要求的IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据；（2）项目文件中引用时的IEC 62933系统级安全与策划证据；（3）项目包中要求的EN/IEC方向消防安全安装控制；（4）锂电池物流的UN 38.3运输文件；（5）确认220/380 V 50 Hz下的项目接入设置。东帝汶与中国名义电压和频率一致，有利于消除换算风险。电动汽车及充电生态仍处于起步阶段，充电市场接入仍以项目为主，IEC接口要求仅在该类项目中适用。
answer_first.zht: 東帝汶目前尚未確認完全成熟且公開的全國性BESS產品強制性安全法規。該市場屬於發展階段，ANE 承擔國家標準路徑角色，EDTL 處理電力部門併網介面，能源主管機構在項目批准中被引用。中國到東帝汶BESS的實際差距通常包括：（1）項目文件要求的IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據；（2）項目文件中引用時的IEC 62933系統級安全與規劃證據；（3）項目包中要求的EN/IEC方向消防安全安裝控制；（4）鋰電池物流的UN 38.3運輸文件；（5）確認220/380 V 50 Hz下的項目接入設定。東帝汶與中國名義電壓和頻率一致，較有利於消除換算風險。電動汽車及充電生態仍處起步階段，充電市場進入仍以項目為主，IEC接口要求僅在相關項目中適用。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
